name: Genesis Design System Archive
description: Complete content archive of articles, tutorials, and documentation about the Genesis Semantic Design System.

hasPart.headline: The Ontological Approach to CSS Architecture
hasPart.description: How six semantic categories replace raw CSS with intent-driven mixins.

hasPart.headline: The Architecture of Ontological Design Systems
hasPart.description: Three-tier architecture: content semantics, role mapping, and visual engine.

hasPart.headline: OKLCH Color Science in Practice
hasPart.description: How perceptually uniform OKLCH colors improve design consistency and accessibility.

hasPart.headline: Fluid Typography Without Breakpoints
hasPart.description: Using clamp() for responsive type that scales smoothly from mobile to ultrawide.

hasPart.headline: Living Genome: Evolving Design Through AI Collaboration
hasPart.description: How AI agents review ontological propositions and grow the design system with memory.
